summary: Iteration 7 Comprehensive Testing Complete - All backend APIs and frontend UI features working correctly. This is the first test in the new forked session. Backend: 22/22 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified including homepage, transfer/withdraw forms, method picker modals with Indonesian bank/e-wallet logos, fee estimation, minimum amount validation, chatbot, and FAQ page.
seed_data_creation: None new - using existing seeded test and admin users
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is the first test in the new forked session. All APIs and UI features are working correctly. The backend uses FastAPI with MongoDB. The minimum amount validation (10,000 IDR) works on both backend and frontend. The AI chatbot uses OpenAI via Emergent LLM key. The method picker shows card-style Indonesian bank/e-wallet options with real logos, fees, and ETAs.

backend_api_tests.health_check: PASSED - GET /api/ returns Meridiant API v2.0.0
backend_api_tests.signup_new_user: PASSED - POST /api/auth/signup creates user and returns token
backend_api_tests.signup_duplicate_email: PASSED - POST /api/auth/signup rejects duplicate email with 400
backend_api_tests.signin_success: PASSED - POST /api/auth/signin returns token for valid credentials
backend_api_tests.signin_invalid_password: PASSED - POST /api/auth/signin returns 401 for invalid password
backend_api_tests.signin_invalid_email: PASSED - POST /api/auth/signin returns 401 for non-existent email
backend_api_tests.get_me_success: PASSED - GET /api/auth/me returns current user with Bearer token
backend_api_tests.get_me_invalid_token: PASSED - GET /api/auth/me returns 401 with invalid token
backend_api_tests.reject_below_minimum: PASSED - POST /api/transactions returns 400 for amount < 10,000 IDR
backend_api_tests.update_profile: PASSED - PUT /api/profile updates name and phone
backend_api_tests.admin_stats: PASSED - GET /api/admin/stats returns dashboard stats for admin

frontend_ui_tests.homepage_loads: PASSED - Transfer Crypto hero section visible
frontend_ui_tests.hero_features: PASSED - Instan, Aman, Multi-Chain badges visible
frontend_ui_tests.transfer_tab: PASSED - Transfer tab with On Chain badge visible
frontend_ui_tests.withdraw_tab: PASSED - Withdraw tab with Off Chain badge visible
frontend_ui_tests.min_amount_hint: PASSED - 'Min. Rp 10,000' hint visible under Transfer input
frontend_ui_tests.amount_error: PASSED - Error message shown for amount < 10,000 IDR
frontend_ui_tests.fee_estimation: PASSED - Fee estimation box visible when amount > 0
frontend_ui_tests.method_picker_transfer: PASSED - Modal shows 6 banks, 5 e-wallets, QRIS with logos
frontend_ui_tests.method_picker_fees_transfer: PASSED - All 12 items show 'Gratis' (free) for transfer
frontend_ui_tests.signin_modal: PASSED - Sign in modal opens and login works
frontend_ui_tests.chatbot_widget: PASSED - Chatbot toggle button visible in bottom-right
frontend_ui_tests.chatbot_window: PASSED - Chatbot window opens with 'Meridiant CS' header
frontend_ui_tests.chatbot_ai_response: PASSED - AI responds to messages (3 messages after sending 'Halo')
frontend_ui_tests.faq_page: PASSED - FAQ page loads from footer link with 8 questions

authentication.details: Email signup/signin, JWT tokens, protected routes

wallet_connect.details: Connect/disconnect wallet with MetaMask, OKX, Phantom, Solflare

live_prices.details: Exchange rates from CoinGecko with fallback

transactions.details: Create transfer/withdraw, minimum validation, list transactions

minimum_amount_validation.details: Backend returns 400 for <10,000 IDR. Frontend shows error and disables submit.

method_picker_ui.details: Card-style modal with bank/e-wallet logos (BCA, BNI, Mandiri, BRI, CIMB Niaga, Permata, GoPay, OVO, DANA, ShopeePay, LinkAja, QRIS)

fee_estimation.details: Shows estimated receive amount, network fee (~Rp 5,000), total fee

withdraw_destination_fees.details: Banks: Rp 2,500, E-wallets: Rp 1,000, QRIS: Gratis

ai_chatbot.details: POST /api/chat uses OpenAI via Emergent LLM key, responds in Indonesian

admin_dashboard.details: GET /api/admin/stats returns stats, restricted to admin@meridiant.com

faq_page.details: 8 FAQ items with expandable answers in Indonesian
